lsp.justification: The answer covers all GT-scored shared state and the key synchronization distinctions: per-worker bio_jobs/bio_jobs_counter under bio_mutex[worker], bio_comp_list under separate bio_mutex_comp, job_comp_pipe with no mutex, redisAtomic AOF fields, and immutable server.bio_cpulist. It slightly over-includes heap job/completion payload handoff and omits listing mutex globals as shared state themselves, but it correctly identifies those primitives and does not miss a substantive GT dimension.
